title: Keep Document
description: Core schema for a Keep workspace document. Every Markdown file in a Keep workspace must satisfy this schema regardless of its kind.

slug.title: Slug
slug.description: Unique identifier for the document across the workspace. URL-safe, kebab-case.

kind.title: Kind
kind.description: Semantic document type, e.g. 'recipe', 'person', 'note', 'experiment'. Drives extension selection.

status.title: Status
status.description: Lifecycle stage of the document. Documents at 'published' or 'canon' must pass linting with zero hard violations.

date_created.title: Date Created
date_created.description: ISO 8601 creation date in YYYY-MM-DD format.

tags.title: Tags
tags.description: Freeform tags for discovery and filtering.

private.title: Private
private.description: If true, the document is excluded from index.md and cannot be the target of relations from non-private documents.

summary.title: Summary
summary.description: One-sentence description of the document. Used to populate index.md. Intended to be written by an LLM during ingest.

relations.title: Relations
relations.description: Typed directed edges to other documents in the workspace.

items.title: Relation
items.description: A single typed directed edge to another document.

target.title: Target
target.description: Slug of the target document. Must resolve to an existing document in the workspace.

type.title: Type
type.description: Semantic type of the relation. 'contradicts' and 'supersedes' are symmetric — Keep auto-injects the reciprocal.

auto_injected.title: Auto Injected
auto_injected.description: True when this relation was written by Keep rather than authored by a human or LLM. Never set this manually.
